steps.title: Link outlier to evidence
steps.content: The first clause calls Iceland's volcanoes extreme outliers because their magma comes from nearly 3,000 km deep. The next clause supports that claim by explaining that many volcanoes are fed by much shallower magma.

steps.title: Reject contrast and result
steps.content: B would signal contrast, but the second clause supports the outlier claim. C would add a separate point instead of confirming the same one. D would make shallow magma a result of Iceland's outlier status, which is illogical. The answer is A.
